title: Quiz: The Diffusion Operator
description: Test your understanding of the diffusion operator

questions.question: The diffusion operator D is:
questions.explanation: D = 2|s⟩⟨s| - I reflects about the uniform superposition.

questions.question: The diffusion operator performs:
questions.explanation: Each amplitude aᵢ becomes 2μ - aᵢ where μ is the mean.

questions.question: The diffusion operator can be implemented using only Hadamard gates and a phase operation.
questions.explanation: D = H^⊗n · (2|0⟩⟨0| - I) · H^⊗n uses Hadamards and conditional phase.
